misc.title: [#ONEPIECE1186] The long flaps on Growlo hair is not his hair yall!! It’s design based off the military pilot aviator hats, with the long ear flaps and googles. Meaning Oda is going for like pilot lik
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE1186] The long flaps on Growlo hair is not his hair yall!! It’s design based off the military pilot aviator hats, with the long ear flaps and googles. Meaning Oda is going for like pilot like aesthetic for Growlo. Cont.

misc.title: Most of the drop is due to the lack of a Switch version. Comparing just the Switch 2 and PS5 versions, then Elliot is flat with Octopath 0. A bit of a genre chance, from turn based to action RPG (and
misc.text: Most of the drop is due to the lack of a Switch version. Comparing just the Switch 2 and PS5 versions, then Elliot is flat with Octopath 0. A bit of a genre chance, from turn based to action RPG (and imo, the game's terrible title) are probably against it too.

misc.title: Comparing retail launch sales of The Adventures of Elliiot: The Millenium Tales with other HD-2D games in Japan. It's the worst launch of one of these games yet, about 2/3s of the launch of Octopath 0
misc.text: Comparing retail launch sales of The Adventures of Elliiot: The Millenium Tales with other HD-2D games in Japan. It's the worst launch of one of these games yet, about 2/3s of the launch of Octopath 0. Decent digital sales are expected, but I'd expect to be the lowest even then

misc.title: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an av
misc.text: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an average temperature of 29.8°C Around 40 people are confirmed to have drowned while swimming in efforts to cool down. (theguardian.com/world/2026/j…) Community note: The 29.8°C is France's national average of day and night temperatures across 30 weather stations; local highs reached 44.3°C. The 40 drownings occurred over the past week during the heatwave. apnews.com/article/heat-w… bbc.com/news/articles/… — https://nitter.net/PopBase/status/2069754874074398969#m

items.title: Most of the drop is due to the lack of a Switch version. Comparing just the Switch 2 and PS5 versions, then Elliot is flat with Octopath 0. A bit of a genre chance, from turn based to action RPG (and
items.text: Most of the drop is due to the lack of a Switch version. Comparing just the Switch 2 and PS5 versions, then Elliot is flat with Octopath 0. A bit of a genre chance, from turn based to action RPG (and imo, the game's terrible title) are probably against it too.
